known_gaps.message: The plan is prepared only; no live run has been performed.

action.text: Show that the repo has product-level presentation_skills rows, not only primitive mechanics.
Matrix list includes product rows grouped by lifecycle, matrix, evidence, planning, showcase, capsules, MCP, hosts, migration, and release.
Generate a showcase plan and explain selected rows, reasons, exclusions, and evidence gaps.
The plan is prepared_not_performed and favors high-value golden product rows.
Show evidence status and explain how evidence IDs map back to stable use-case IDs and semantic hashes.
Evidence is append-only proof data and does not become approval or instruction.
Start or inspect a showcase run and show observation, verdict, finish, and status replay events.
The run status is derived from events and remains separate from user approval.
Show verdict, verification, completion, and approval as separate status dimensions.
A run can be performed, incomplete, blocked, or unapproved without collapsing those states.
Compare CLI and MCP contract semantics for a read command.
MCP wraps the CLI/core contract rather than reimplementing product logic.
Show that MCP can request a trusted approval path but cannot write user approval.
User approval requires a trusted user confirmation path outside model-controlled MCP writes.
Show host conformance status and distinguish passed, failed, not_run, static conformance, and live support proof.
Host profile existence is not overstated as verified live host support.
Show package doctor or artifact inspection proof for the installable package, not only the checkout.
Release proof is bound to packaged files and runtime entrypoints.
Summarize how this repo uses its own matrix, evidence, and showcase run as release proof for the demonstrated scope.
The dogfood bundle shows demonstrated scope, evidence gaps, and any user sign-off still required.

payload.observation: Observed matrix validation/listing returned 19 loaded YAML shards and 75 addressable rows, including product-level presentation_skills rows alongside primitive support rows.
Observed showcase planning generated prepared_not_performed plans with explicit evidence gaps; the feature-tour capsule selected 10 intended product rows.
Observed evidence status replay cleanly with 7 active aggregates linking evidence IDs to use-case semantic hashes and no invalid aggregates.
Observed capsule run run.self_matrix_feature_tour_start write run-start and action events, then require runtime observations before verdicts.
Observed showcase status separates execution_status, run_outcome, approval_state, item verdict, item currency, and verification state.
Observed MCP parity coverage pass in the targeted Vitest run: 30 files and 133 tests passed, including stdio parity and wrapper semantics.
Observed MCP approval-boundary coverage pass in the targeted Vitest run; MCP can request approval flow but does not write user approval.
Observed host conformance complete with Codex passed, Claude SIGBUS reported as not_run, Copilot unavailable as not_run, and OpenCode missing as not_run.
Observed doctor package inspect a real tarball with required paths and bin entrypoints present and forbidden paths/text empty.
Observed self-dogfood bundle combine clean matrix, feature-tour capsule run, agent observations, tests, host caveats, and package proof without recording user approval.
